title: 6. The immune system Improvement:
text:
a) Consumption of vitamin A.25000
Adults twice a week and children once a week. Due to its good antiviral effect.
b) Daily consumption of vitamin E.100 as a good antioxidant.
c) Daily consumption of vitamin C, in the form of natural fruits and juices such as
kiwi or orange juice and lemon.
To use chemical vitamin C is not recommended at all, because by increasing
acidosis, the body can create the conditions for the virus to grow.
(There is disagreement between scientists.)
d) Daily intake of selenium 200 micrograms.
This micronutrient has a good effect on the prevention and treatment of Corona
virus.
e) Raw nuts such as walnuts, almonds and hazelnuts are natural and rich sources of
zinc, selenium and other essential micronutrients.
f) Consumption of Zinc supplements, due to its good effects on the defense system.
However, its use for Corona virus is not accepted by some scientists.
g) Magnesium: 300 to 500 mg daily
4 | P a g e
h) Levamisole tablets 50.
To increase the immune system. Every 12 or 8 hours for up to 3 days
The Concomitant use of it with Hydroxychloroquine and azithromycin is not
recommended.
It should be used with caution for patients with heart diseases.
It is favorable to have a blood cell count base, before use of levamisole.
Its use seems to be very useful for the prevention of disease in those around the patient
and in the early stages of Corona virus.
However, taking this drug for 2 to 3 days is unlikely to cause any particular problem.
I)  Basic energy points: (image below)
To color Red spots on these points, have a good effect on the overall body system and
increases the body's resistance and ability.
Method  Paint these spots red, one day on the palm of the right hand and the back of
the left hand, and the next day vice versa.
It is important to observe the order of coloring and the distance between the points.
The favorable duration of remaining color of the spots are about 8 hours and for about
2 weeks.
5 | P a g e
j)  NG   Points ( 1 , 3 , 5 ) from  Wu Hu(11.27)
Needling the above 3 points from the set of these 5 points (1, 3, 5),
One hand in each treatment session (left, Right) has a significant effect on improving
the function of the immune system.
6 | P a g e
k)  NG  points on the earlobe. Having anti-allergy and anti-viral properties.
7 | P a g e
l) NG  Fist points or San Cha San.
These points, in addition to having many uses that will be mentioned later, are
among the Powerful immune booster points.
8 | P a g e

m)  Another way to strengthen the immune system:
NG 
Combining these points is an excellent way to strengthen the immune system
and protect the lungs.
A) Prevention = two days a week
B) Treatment = on alternate days
In each session, the duration of needling is 45 to 60 minutes.

Fever

Method 1 = To color black all fingertips with a black pen or marker until the fever
is over and then erase them.
Method 2 = Cool your fingertips using cold water or place your fingertips on ice.
